Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Hm, I dunno about the net café... Why don't we go someplace else?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Зачекай, дай-но подивлюся, скільки в мене грошей залишилось...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Oh no! Where's my wallet!? Did I drop it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}But, when? I had it when I pulled out my train pass...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Wait... Someone bumped into me outside the station![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Sorry, I'm gonna go back there and look around. It'll just take a minute![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Зі мною все буде гаразд, тому не йди за мною![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Дедалі більше людей починає заглядатися на мене...[n]{f 1 1}
